mapper.select: SELECT BASKET_NO, MG.NO AS NO, MG.GROUP_NO AS GROUP_NO, M.NICKNAME AS NICKNAME, G.GROUP_TITLE AS GROUP_TITLE, G.IMG_URL1 AS IMG_URL1, G.COMMENT1 AS COMMENT1, TO_CHAR(G.START_DATE, 'MM"월" DD"일"') AS START_DATE, G.REG_DATE AS REG_DATE, TO_CHAR(G.LAST_DATE, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI') AS LAST_DATE, G.CATEGORY AS CATEGORY, MG.PRICE AS PRICE, G.USER_MAX AS USER_MAX, G.AREA AS AREA, MG.STATUS AS STATUS FROM BASKET MG LEFT JOIN MEMBER M ON MG.NO = M.NO LEFT JOIN GROUP_MORAK G ON MG.GROUP_NO = G.GROUP_NO WHERE MG.NO = #{idx} ORDER BY BASKET_NO
